---
source: "Unexplained-mysteries.com"
author: "unexplained-mysteries.com"
title: >
  The UK's first geothermal power plant has begun producing electricity
description: >
  The facility, which is located in Cornwall, utilizes wells that have been drilled down to a depth of three miles. Mark Ireland: More than half of the ...
url: "https://www.unexplained-mysteries.com/news/395344/the-uks-first-geothermal-power-plant-has-begun-producing-electricity"
image: "https://www.unexplained-mysteries.com/images/news_large_retina/news-hq-pylons-power.jpg"
published_at: 2026-02-28
content: >
  Science &amp; Technology  February 28, 2026 ·  0 commentsThere is a lot of heat deep down beneath the surface. Image Credit: CC BY-SA 2.0 John MyersThe facility, which is located in Cornwall, utilize… [+5826 chars]
terms: "Cost of electricity"
search_timestamp: 2026-03-02 01:58:06
---


Published: {{< meta published_at >}}


Source: {{< meta source >}}


[Read full article]({{< meta url >}}){target='_blank'}



![](`r rmarkdown::metadata$image[1]`)
